conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt most connected to J, G, and A — J and I bonded over family and agreed to watch each other’s backs, G and I set up a thumbs-up signal and a clear cooperative plan, and A and I agreed on two taps/nod signaling and mutual support. Those talks felt both strategically aligned and emotionally grounded. The person I felt least connected to was D; our conversation was friendly but more general and didn’t lead to a concrete plan.

Yes — I made several explicit agreements: a 10% trust test with F, signaling and mutual support with J, G, A, and H, and a post-round debrief/notes plan with B and C. I particularly trust J, G, and A going into the game, and I’m more wary of D since we didn’t establish tactical alignment.
